part.text:
I've added a single-file, self-contained Snake game at index.html. It includes all HTML, CSS, and JavaScript inline and meets your requirements:

- Arrow key controls (also supports WASD)
- Score display and high score (persisted in localStorage)
- Game over detection (wall or self-collision)
- Restart ability (Restart button or Enter)
- Start/Pause and Reset buttons
- Polished look with responsive canvas and optional on-screen D-pad for mobile
- Copy score button

What I changed
- Created index.html at the project root with a complete game implementation.
- UI elements for score, high score, canvas, controls, and game-over overlay.
- Responsive canvas sizing and subtle visuals (shadows, rounded cells).

How to run
- Open index.html in your browser.

If you want any changes (different grid size, faster base speed, keyboard-only UI, better mobile controls, or adding themes), tell me which and I’ll make a minimal change.
